tools.name: agent_create
tools.description: Create an agent: register in the Hive with a validated profile.

tools.name: agent_delete
tools.description: Delete a registered agent from the Hive.

tools.name: agent_list
tools.description: List all registered agents in the Hive.

tools.name: agent_register
tools.description: Register an agent in the Hive.

tools.name: brain_forget
tools.description: Archive a memory by key. The memory is not permanently deleted.

tools.name: brain_learn_failure
tools.description: Record a failed task outcome to avoid repeating mistakes.

tools.name: brain_learn_success
tools.description: Record a successful task outcome.

tools.name: brain_recall
tools.description: Recall memories matching a query.

tools.name: brain_remember
tools.description: Save a memory to the agent's brain.

tools.name: brain_status
tools.description: Show agent identity, group memberships, store stats, and Hive connectivity.

tools.name: diagnostics_history
tools.description: Return recent persisted diagnostics snapshots.

tools.name: diagnostics_report
tools.description: Run quality diagnostics (EPIC-030): composite score, dimensions, circuit state.

tools.name: feedback_gap
tools.description: Report a knowledge gap (``gap_reported`` event).

tools.name: feedback_issue
tools.description: Flag a quality issue with a memory entry (``issue_flagged``).

tools.name: feedback_query
tools.description: Query recorded feedback events with optional filters.

tools.name: feedback_rate
tools.description: Rate a recalled memory entry (creates ``recall_rated`` event).

tools.name: feedback_record
tools.description: Record a generic feedback event (built-in or custom type).

tools.name: flywheel_evaluate
tools.description: Run BEIR-format directory or YAML suite evaluation.

tools.name: flywheel_gaps
tools.description: Return top knowledge gaps as JSON.

tools.name: flywheel_hive_feedback
tools.description: Aggregate / apply Hive cross-project feedback penalties.

tools.name: flywheel_process
tools.description: Run feedback → confidence pipeline (EPIC-031).

tools.name: flywheel_report
tools.description: Generate quality report (markdown + structured summary).

tools.name: hive_propagate
tools.description: Manually propagate a local memory to the Hive shared store.

tools.name: hive_push
tools.description: Batch-promote local project memories to the Hive (GitHub #18).

tools.name: hive_search
tools.description: Search the shared Hive for memories from other agents.

tools.name: hive_status
tools.description: Return Hive status: namespaces, entry counts, and registered agents.

tools.name: hive_wait_write
tools.description: Wait until the Hive write revision exceeds *since_revision* or timeout.

tools.name: hive_write_revision
tools.description: Return the Hive write notification revision (GitHub #12).

tools.name: maintenance_consolidate
tools.description: Trigger memory consolidation to merge similar entries.

tools.name: maintenance_gc
tools.description: Run garbage collection to archive stale memories.

tools.name: maintenance_stale
tools.description: List GC stale memory candidates with reasons (read-only; GitHub #21).

tools.name: memory_audit
tools.description: Query the audit trail for memory events.

tools.name: memory_capture
tools.description: Extract and persist new facts from an agent response.

tools.name: memory_consolidation_config
tools.description: Return the current auto-consolidation configuration.

tools.name: memory_consolidation_config_set
tools.description: Update auto-consolidation configuration.

tools.name: memory_delete
tools.description: Delete a memory entry by key.

tools.name: memory_entries_by_tag
tools.description: Return all memory entries that carry a specific tag.

tools.name: memory_export
tools.description: Export memory entries as JSON.

tools.name: memory_find_related
tools.description: Find entries related to a key via BFS traversal of the relation graph.

tools.name: memory_gc_config
tools.description: Return the current garbage collection configuration.

tools.name: memory_gc_config_set
tools.description: Update garbage collection configuration thresholds.

tools.name: memory_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single memory entry by key.

tools.name: memory_history
tools.description: Show the full version chain for a memory key.

tools.name: memory_import
tools.description: Import memory entries from a JSON string.

tools.name: memory_index_session
tools.description: Index session chunks for future search.

tools.name: memory_ingest
tools.description: Extract and store durable facts from conversation context.

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: List memory entries with optional filters.

tools.name: memory_list_groups
tools.description: List distinct project-local memory group names (GitHub #49).

tools.name: memory_list_tags
tools.description: List all tags used in the memory store with their usage counts.

tools.name: memory_profile_onboarding
tools.description: Return Markdown onboarding guidance for the active memory profile (GitHub #45).

tools.name: memory_query_relations
tools.description: Filter relations by subject, predicate, and/or object_entity.

tools.name: memory_recall
tools.description: Run auto-recall for a message and return ranked memories.

tools.name: memory_reinforce
tools.description: Reinforce a memory entry, boosting its confidence and resetting decay.

tools.name: memory_relations
tools.description: Return all relations associated with a memory entry key.

tools.name: memory_relations_get_batch
tools.description: Return relations for multiple memory keys in one call (STORY-048.2).

tools.name: memory_save
tools.description: Save or update a memory entry.

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Search memory entries using full-text search.

tools.name: memory_search_sessions
tools.description: Search past session summaries.

tools.name: memory_supersede
tools.description: Create a new version of a memory, superseding the old one.

tools.name: memory_update_tags
tools.description: Atomically add and/or remove tags on an existing memory entry.

tools.name: profile_info
tools.description: Return the active profile name, layers, and scoring config.

tools.name: profile_switch
tools.description: Switch to a different built-in memory profile.

tools.name: tapps_brain_health
tools.description: Return a structured health report for tapps-brain (issue #15).

tools.name: tapps_brain_relay_export
tools.description: Build a memory relay JSON payload for cross-node handoff (GitHub #19).

tools.name: tapps_brain_session_end
tools.description: Record an end-of-session episodic memory entry.

resources.description: Agent integration snapshot: versions, profile, tiers, recall empty codes.
Latest diagnostics report (does not append history by default).
Full detail view of a single memory entry.
Recent feedback events (up to 500), newest-friendly order by query default.
Operation metrics: counters and latency histograms.
Latest flywheel quality report summary (from last ``generate_report``).
Store stats: counts, tiers, schema, package/profile, optional profile_seed_version.
